resources.string: Before you start, please read and accept
I accept the Terms of Use
Place your phone face up on a flat surface with the speaker facing down. Make sure the volume is at maximum. Do not hold the phone during cleaning.

GSL v1.0 — Graltion Software License

Permitted:
- Use the application for personal purposes
- View and study the source code
- Share the link to the original application

Prohibited:
- Copy, clone, use, or distribute the source code
- Release your own versions based on our code
- Remove mentions of Graltion Corporation
- Use the name Graltion or GSL in your own projects

Disclaimer:
Graltion Corporation is not responsible for any damage to your device resulting from improper use of this application. Use at your own risk.

Graltion Corporation guarantees:

- We do not collect any user data
- No telemetry or tracking of any kind
- All settings are stored locally on your device only
- No internet connection is required or used
- No third-party analytics or advertising SDKs

Your data is yours. Always.

This application uses the following open source components:

- Jetpack Compose - Apache License 2.0
- AndroidX Navigation - Apache License 2.0
- AndroidX DataStore - Apache License 2.0
- AndroidX Core SplashScreen - Apache License 2.0

AquaClean is distributed under the Graltion Software License (GSL v1.0).

© 2026 Graltion Corporation
